name: order_id
description: Unique identifier for each customer order.

name: customer_name
description: Name of the customer who placed the order.

name: amount
description: Total monetary value of the order, stored as a string.

name: status
description: Current status of the order (e.g., COMPLETED, PENDING, SHIPPED).

name: order_date
description: Date when the order was placed, stored as a string.
